name: Lover's Lotion
outcome: [AttackerName] pours the erotic lubricant over [TargetName]'s body, coaxing gasping moans of pleasure out of [TargetHimOrHer] as [AttackerHeOrShe] sensually massages the warm pink liquid into [TargetHimOrHer].
miss: [AttackerName] goes to pour the pink lubricant over [TargetName]'s body, but an unfortunate moment of clumsiness instead sends the bottle clattering to the floor, spilling its contents worthlessly.
statusOutcome: |f|ApplyStatusEffectToMonster|/|LoversLotionAtk|n|As [AttackerName] lovingly kneads the lotion into [TargetName]'s skin, [TargetHeOrShe] can't help but dreamily gaze at [AttackerHimOrHer] with intoxicated passion, leaving [TargetHimOrHer] dizzily unfocused.
